---
title: "TeamUp"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    css: teamup.css

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false 
---

```{r setup}
library(googlesheets4)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(stringr)
library(rlang)

# ── CONFIG ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SHEET_URL <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1_cDDUJcERRd3MrDHoIJPBdKcqUKQS1ZHHqKLzIGkiJk/edit?usp=sharing"  # <-- replace with your sheet URL

# Expected column names from your Google Form:
# name | skills | level | role_seeking | team_status | contact | bio
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

gs4_deauth()  # remove if your sheet is private (will trigger OAuth)
# participants <- tryCatch(
#   read_sheet(SHEET_URL),
#   error = function(e) NULL
# )
participants <- tryCatch(
  read_sheet(SHEET_URL) |>
    rename(
      timestamp     = `Timestamp`,
      email_form    = `Email Address`,      # the auto-collected form email
      name          = `Full name`,
      skills        = `Skills`,
      bio           = `Short bio`,
      role_seeking  = `Role looking for`,
      email         = `email address`,
      linkedin      = `LinkIn profile`,
      github        = `Github profile`,
      contact_other = `Other contact handle`
    ),
  error = function(e) NULL
)
```

::: {.teamup-hero}
<div class="hero-label">WOAH DATATHON</div>
# Find Your Team
<p class="hero-sub">Connect with fellow participants · Build something great together</p>

```{r form-link}
# Replace with your actual Google Form URL
form_url <- "https://forms.gle/EHUkhVCdrPezKj85A"
htmltools::HTML(glue::glue(
  '<a href="{form_url}" target="_blank" class="cta-btn">
    <span>+ Add your profile</span>
  </a>'
))
```
:::

```{r filters}
htmltools::HTML('
<script>
function searchCards(query) {
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  document.querySelectorAll(".participant-card").forEach(card => {
    card.style.display =
      card.dataset.skills.includes(q) || q === "" ? "" : "none";
  });
}
</script>
')
```

```{r cards}
# ── Skill tag colours ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
skill_color <- function(skill) {
  skill <- tolower(trimws(skill))
  colors <- list(
    "ml" = "#ff6b35", "machine learning" = "#ff6b35",
    "nlp" = "#a855f7", "deep learning" = "#a855f7",
    "python" = "#3b82f6", "r" = "#10b981",
    "sql" = "#f59e0b", "data viz" = "#ec4899",
    "visualization" = "#ec4899", "statistics" = "#06b6d4",
    "data engineering" = "#84cc16", "cloud" = "#6366f1",
    "frontend" = "#f43f5e"
  )
  colors[[skill]] %||% "#64748b"
}



# ── Render one card ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
render_card <- function(row) {
  skills_raw <- str_split(row$skills %||% "", "[,;]")[[1]]
  skill_tags <- paste(sapply(trimws(skills_raw), function(sk) {
    col <- skill_color(sk)
    sprintf('<span class="skill-tag" style="border-color:%s;color:%s">%s</span>', col, col, sk)
  }), collapse = "")

  contact_links <- ""
  if (nzchar(row$github %||% "")) {
    handle <- gsub("^@|https?://(www\\.)?github\\.com/", "", row$github)
    contact_links <- paste0(contact_links,
      sprintf('<a href="https://github.com/%s" target="_blank" class="contact-link">GitHub</a>', handle))
  }
  if (nzchar(row$linkedin %||% "")) {
    url <- ifelse(grepl("^http", row$linkedin), row$linkedin,
                  paste0("https://linkedin.com/in/", gsub("^@", "", row$linkedin)))
    contact_links <- paste0(contact_links,
      sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" class="contact-link">LinkedIn</a>', url))
  }
  if (nzchar(row$email %||% "")) {
    contact_links <- paste0(contact_links,
      sprintf('<a href="mailto:%s" class="contact-link">Email</a>', row$email))
  }
  if (nzchar(row$contact_other %||% "")) {
    contact_links <- paste0(contact_links,
      sprintf('<span class="contact-plain">%s</span>', row$contact_other))
  }

  sprintf('
<div class="participant-card" data-skills="%s">
  <div class="card-top">
    <div class="avatar">%s</div>
    <div class="card-meta">
      <div class="participant-name">%s</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p class="participant-bio">%s</p>
  <div class="skill-tags">%s</div>
  <div class="card-footer">
    <span class="role-seeking">🎯 %s</span>
    <div class="contact-links">%s</div>
  </div>
</div>',
    tolower(row$skills %||% ""),
    toupper(substr(row$name %||% "?", 1, 1)),
    row$name %||% "Anonymous",
    row$bio %||% "",
    skill_tags,
    row$role_seeking %||% "Open to anything",
    contact_links
  )
}


if (is.null(participants) || nrow(participants) == 0) {
  htmltools::HTML('
<div class="empty-state">
  <div class="empty-icon">🛰</div>
  <p>No profiles yet — be the first to join!</p>
</div>')
} else {
  cards_html <- paste(
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(participants)), function(i) render_card(participants[i, ])),
    collapse = "\n"
  )
  htmltools::HTML(sprintf('<div class="cards-grid" id="cardsGrid">%s</div>', cards_html))
}
```

```{r js}
htmltools::HTML('
<script>
function filterCards(status) {
  document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
  event.target.classList.add("active");
  document.querySelectorAll(".participant-card").forEach(card => {
    card.style.display =
      status === "all" || card.dataset.status === status ? "" : "none";
  });
}
function searchCards(query) {
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  document.querySelectorAll(".participant-card").forEach(card => {
    card.style.display =
      card.dataset.skills.includes(q) || q === "" ? "" : "none";
  });
}
</script>
')
```
